description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The exterior is finished in a light beige or off-white color, with large, vertically oriented windows providing ample natural light. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and features a driveway leading to a covered carport on one side. There is a small landscaped area with shrubs and a tree in the front yard, and a paved walkway leads to the main entrance. The roof includes a small terrace or utility area, and the rear of the house has additional outdoor space.
description: A modern, two-story flat-roofed house with large windows, a carport, and a fenced yard featuring landscaping and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, wooden fence, and the back facade with fewer windows.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the flat roof, terrace area, and a large tree in the backyard.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the carport, driveway, and the side of the house with multiple windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small steps, and a paved walkway, adjacent to a covered carport.
